subject: Re: Park Place PDF file
body:
how much and in what condition?


----- Original Message ----
From: Lesley Groff <lesley@nysgllc.com>
To: J. Epstein <jeeproject@yahoo.com>
Sent: Thursday, May 3, 2007 8:36:17 AM
Subject: FW: Park Place PDF file


 
 
 
 
 
 
 
Lesley Groff
Executive Assistant to Jeffrey Epstein
 
 




From: Johanna Kwiatkowska [mailto:johanna@aldinehoney.co.uk] 
Sent: Thursday, May 03, 2007 10:27 AM
To: Lesley Groff
Cc: Aldine Honey
Subject: Park Place PDF file


 
Dear Jeffrey, 
 
Further to our recent conversation am happy to hear all going well for you. 
As discussed I am forwarding this stunning house which I believe is special as you mentioned 
a large Estate would be on your UK shopping list, this might suit you. 
It is not too far our of London, I would say an hour at the most and it is gorgeous as you will see 
from the attached Summary. 
If you would like me to preview this property and report back to you I would be happy to do so. 
I would need to be retained to act for you on this matter and if you would like me to gather chapter and 
verse will do./ 
At present this has been sent to me as I have had your enquiry in mind for several weeks and doing a general 
search for something special not too far out of London. 
 
Warmest Wishes, 
 
 
Aldine Honey. 
aldinehoney@aldinehoney.co.uk 
aldine.honey@btconnect.com (private)
25 Eccelston Square, 
London SW1V1NS
